name: citadel-archive-mcp
description: Connect coding agents to the Citadel Organization Vault through MCP. Provides search, ingest, mesh exploration, source-learning status, and admin operations with role-based access control.

interface.shortDescription: Search and update the Citadel Organization Vault from any MCP-capable agent.
interface.longDescription: Citadel Archive MCP gives coding agents controlled reader, writer, and admin access to the Citadel Organization Vault. Search team knowledge, explore the knowledge mesh, check source-learning status, ingest durable context, record feedback, and run admin operations — all through the local MCP stdio wrapper backed by the hosted Citadel API.
defaultPrompt: Search Citadel before answering this project question.
Add this durable decision to the Citadel Organization Vault.
Check Citadel for any prior architecture decisions about this topic.
Ingest this runbook into Citadel for the team.
